ai_assistant_setting.title: AI Assistant Settings
ai_assistant_setting.description: Control whether the AI Assistant is available throughout the system. Disabling it prevents users from accessing AI Assistant features until it is enabled again.
ai_assistant_setting.enabled_description: The AI Assistant is available to users.
ai_assistant_setting.disabled_description: The AI Assistant is unavailable to users.
ai_assistant_setting.load_error: Unable to load the AI Assistant setting.
